zh.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyfer是William De Taillefer的兒子，於大約1260年出生在英國英格蘭肯特。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1336年在英國英格蘭肯特肯特享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyfer是William De Taillefer的儿子，于大约1260年出生在英国英格兰肯特。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1336年在英国英格兰肯特肯特享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Taillyfer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Telfer
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French taille ‘cut’ + fer ‘iron’, perhaps for a strong man or ferocious warrior. The nickname was also used as an Anglo-Norman personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyfer was born about 1260, in Kent, England, United Kingdom as the son of William De Taillefer. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1336, in Kent, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyfer est né environ 1260, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William De Taillefer. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1336, à Kent, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyfer wurde um 1260 in Kent, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von William De Taillefer geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1336 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Kent, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyfer è nato il circa 1260 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di William De Taillefer. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1336, nel Kent, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyferは約1260年にイギリスイギリスケントでWilliam De Tailleferの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1336年にイギリスイギリスケントケントで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyfer(은)는 대략 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 William De Taillefer의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 켄트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyfer nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de William De Taillefer. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1336, em Kent, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Taillyfer родился около 1260 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали William De Taillefer. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1336 г. в местности кэнт, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.
